# Claude Hacks

> A hackathon powered by Claude AI, hosted by the Claude Builders Club at The Ohio State University. Claude Hacks 2026 has concluded.

## Event Details

- Name: Claude Hacks
- Dates: April 17–19, 2026 (concluded)
- Location: Pomerene Hall 280, The Ohio State University, Columbus, OH 43210
- Participants: 100 students, 19 final project submissions
- Website: https://claudehacks.com

## Status

The hackathon is over. Winners have been announced — see https://claudehacks.com/winners.

## Winners

### Open Track
- 1st: EagleEye by Claude Mythos — AI-assisted emergency dispatch that watches highway camera feeds and triages incidents in seconds. Team: Will Campbell, Rishik Panjugala, Connor Walmsley.
- 2nd: Tokenlens by Crtl Alt Elite — Paste any GitHub repo URL to instantly see exactly how much that codebase spends on LLM API calls. Team: Sathvik Allipuram, Harrison Hahner, Srijan Puli, Prajuval Prakash. Demo: https://osutokenlens.vercel.app/
- 3rd: Pilot by DGX Disciples — A macOS agent that drives your iPhone for you using Claude vision and synthetic taps through iPhone Mirroring. Team: Athin Shetty, Sohum Suthar.

### Sustainability Track (sponsored by IGS Energy)
- 1st: Greenify by Awesome Dragons — Tell your house "I'm leaving" or "I'm cooking" and Claude reorganizes your energy use to match. Team: Siddarth Tummala, Kanishk Kovuru, Shukanth Jojodae, Shirish Parasa, Pathiv Medidi.
- 2nd: EnergyWatch by Forecast Fellas — AI dispatch for home solar — when to sell, when to charge, when to pull, explained in plain English. Team: Ayush Pandit, Aaryan Sharma.

## Format

- Friday 5:30–8 PM: Kickoff, check-in, food, introductions, in-person work
- Saturday: Virtual hacking day, continue building remotely
- Sunday 11 AM+: Project submissions due 11 AM, judging at 12 PM, food at 1 PM

## Tracks

- Open: Build anything with Claude AI, no restrictions on topic or domain
- Sustainability: Build solutions addressing environmental or sustainability challenges (sponsored by IGS Energy)

## Prizes

- 1st Place: $750 API Credits + $300 Cash
- 2nd Place: $500 API Credits
- 3rd Place: $250 API Credits
- Total: $1,800+ in prizes

## Judges From

- NVIDIA
- Meta
- Google
- IGS Energy
- AWS
- Vertiv

## Rules

- Teams of 1–5 members, all must be registered
- All code must be written during the hackathon
- Any programming language, framework, or platform allowed
- Submissions were due by 11:00 AM EST Sunday April 19
- Judging criteria: Innovation/Coolness (15), Technical Complexity (15), Impact (5), Presentation (10), Auto Code Review (5) — total /50

## Registration

Registration is closed. Claude Hacks 2026 has concluded.

## Community

- Discord: https://discord.gg/Re7FCAkS

## Contact

- Instagram: @claudeatohiostate
- Hosted by: Claude Builders Club at Ohio State
